{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 46,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "46. Jardana Klaijumâ likke
tas Kehninsch tohs leet zeetaâ
Semmê/ starp Sukotu un starp
Zartann.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 47,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "47. Un Salamans nefwehre
wiſſus tchohs Rihkus ta warren
leela Warra Puſka deht/ta War-
xa Siwars ne bija isimannams.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 48,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "48. Salamans darrija arrt-
dsan wiſſus Rihkus preeffch ta
KUNGA Nammu/ to felta Al-
tari/un to felta Galdu/us ko tahs
Deewam preeffchliktas Maises
gulleja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 49,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "49. Un peežus Lukturus pa
labbo Rohku/ un peežus Luktu-
rus pa kreifoRohku/preeffch tahs
Deewa Runnaschanas Weetas/
no tihra Selta/ar felta Puḱehin
un Etjeß Luktureem un Lukt-
schkehrehn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 50,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "50. Ir tohs Kaufus/ Naschus/
un Beﬀenus/ un Kurrotes/
un Kwehpja-Traukus no tihra Sel-
ta/ ir tahs Engeß Namma
Eekschpuſſe wiſſswehtakaâ Wee-
tâ/ un pee Deewa Namma
Durwim btja no Selta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 51,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "51. Ta tappe wiſſ Darbs pa-
beigts/ ko tas Kehninsch Sala-
mans pee ta KUNGA Namma
darrija. Behz to nefje Salamans
tahs eefwehtitas Leetas farwa
Tehwa Dahvida/ to Sudrabu
un Seltn/ un tohs zittus Rih-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "kus/ un liſſe tohs starpt ta KUN-
GA Namma Mantahm.
Ta VIII. Nodalla.
Salamans leek to Derribas Schkirstu/
un wiſ-
fus fwehtus Rihkus eekſch to Deewa Nammi
nest: 1. Kuerru weena Padebbes pilda: 10
Turra weenuilgujirdigu Luhgſchann preeſch
Deewa/ fa taß patß ar farwu Schehlastib
un Swehtumu eekſch tahdu Mammu gribbe
tu dſhwolt.: 12/ 25. Swehti tohs Laudis
54. Un eefwehti pehdigi to Nammu a
wiſadeem Uppureem: 62.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "2. Ad fapulzinaja tas Reh-
ninsch Salamans toh
Israëta Wezzajus/ u
wiſſus Zilſchn Wirfneekus/ u
Augstakus starp to Israëta Behr
un Tehweenu pee tevi uhs Jeri
salemi/ to Derribas Schkirst
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "3. Un kad wiſſi Israëta We-
zajee nahze/ tad pazehle tee Pre-
steri to Schkirstu/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "4. Un tee nefte ta KUNG-
Schkirstu/ un to Sa-eefchana
Telti/ ar wiſſeem fwehteem Ri-
keem/ kas Telti bija/ tohs neA
tee Preesteri un Lewiti augfcha-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "5. Un tas Kehninsch Sal-
mans/ un wiſſa Israëta Dra-
dse/ kas pee wiſſa bij faputze-
sees/ gahje ar to preeſch
Schkirsta/ un uppureja Awis-
Wehrſchus ne iſſkaitamaâ Puḱe-
un ne iſlihdsinajamaâ Wairum
"
    }
